invite.youAreInvited: You have been invited to visit
invite.invalidDescription: Please contact your host for a new invite

form.title: Your Information
form.description: Please provide your details for visitor registration
form.idNumberHint: Your ID will be securely hashed. We do not store the actual number.
form.vehicleNumberHint: Leave blank if not arriving by vehicle
form.termsAgree: I agree to the visitor terms and privacy policy

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

verify.title: Verify Your Identity
verify.description: Optional identity verification for faster entry
verify.livenessDescription: Take a quick selfie to verify your identity
verify.livenessHint: This helps guards verify you faster on arrival
verify.skipHint: You can still enter, but verification at the gate may take longer

complete.title: Registration Complete
complete.description: You're all set for your visit
complete.qrTitle: Show this QR code on arrival
complete.qrHint: Guards will scan this to verify your access
complete.downloadWalletHint: For the best experience, add your pass to the VaultPass app
complete.reminderHint: We'll send you a reminder before your visit

error.title: Something went wrong
error.genericMessage: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
error.inviteExpired: This invite has expired. Please contact your host for a new invite.
error.inviteNotFound: Invite not found. Please check the link and try again.
